clauses.title: Materiality of IT outsourcing
clauses.text: Classify outsourced IT services by materiality; subject material arrangements to enhanced governance, due diligence and Board oversight.

clauses.title: Due diligence on provider
clauses.text: Conduct due diligence on technical/financial capability, reputation, security posture, ownership/control, and ongoing performance.

clauses.title: Provider DD on staff & sub-contractors
clauses.text: Provider must do background verification on its personnel and sub-contractors with access to RE systems/data.

clauses.title: Agreement schedule (23 terms)
clauses.text: Legally enforceable agreement addressing scope, SLAs, confidentiality, security, audit rights, sub-contracting, termination/exit, liability, Indian governing law.

clauses.title: Data stored & processed only in India
clauses.text: RE data generated/processed under the arrangement must be stored within India and retrievable in India.
clauses.source: RBI IT Outsourcing 2023, Data Storage in India

clauses.title: Audit rights over provider & sub-contractors
clauses.text: RE and its auditors must have the right to audit/inspect the provider and its sub-contractors.

clauses.title: RBI right to inspect
clauses.text: Preserve RBI's right to access/inspect documents/records of provider and sub-contractors.

clauses.title: Prior consent for sub-contracting; provider liable
clauses.text: No material sub-contracting without RE prior written consent; provider remains fully liable for sub-contractors.

clauses.title: Incident reporting enabling 6-hour RBI report
clauses.text: Provider must report incidents without delay so the RE can report to RBI within 6 hours of detection.

clauses.title: Concentration risk
clauses.text: Identify and manage concentration risk from over-reliance on a single/few providers for material IT services.

clauses.title: BCP/DR tested by provider
clauses.text: Provider must maintain and periodically test BCP/DR aligned to RE continuity requirements.

clauses.title: Cross-border country risk
clauses.text: Assess country/legal risk for offshore providers/data flows; ensure RBI/RE access and Indian-law enforceability.

clauses.title: Exit; no data erasure during transition
clauses.text: Documented exit strategy; provider must support orderly exit, return data, and not delete/withhold RE data during transition.

clauses.title: Cloud: keys/HSM under RE control
clauses.text: Encryption keys and HSMs protecting RE data must remain under RE control with ability to manage/revoke independent of CSP.
clauses.source: RBI IT Outsourcing 2023, Appendix I Cloud

clauses.title: Cloud: RBAC, least-privilege, MFA
clauses.text: Enforce RBAC, least-privilege, and MFA for privileged/remote access to RE environments.
clauses.source: RBI IT Outsourcing 2023, Appendix I Cloud

clauses.title: Cloud: CSP logs into RE SOC
clauses.text: CSP must provide security logs/telemetry for ingestion/monitoring by the RE SOC.
clauses.source: RBI IT Outsourcing 2023, Appendix I Cloud

clauses.title: Cloud: patch management
clauses.text: Timely patching/vuln remediation for cloud components under the shared-responsibility model.
clauses.source: RBI IT Outsourcing 2023, Appendix I Cloud

clauses.title: Third-party arrangements (Sec.10)
clauses.text: Manage third-party IT risks: concentration, conflicts of interest, single point of failure, data protection, availability, supply-chain.

clauses.title: Vendor support agreement (Sec.12)
clauses.text: Formal vendor support/maintenance agreement for acquired/critical applications across the lifecycle.

clauses.title: Source code / escrow (Sec.12)
clauses.text: For critical applications, obtain source code or a source-code escrow arrangement for continuity.

clauses.title: Vendor vulnerability-free certification (Sec.12)
clauses.text: Vendor written certification that the application is free of known vulnerabilities, malware and covert channels/back-doors.

clauses.title: Change/patch management (Sec.13)
clauses.text: Controlled change-management with testing, approval and rollback for systems incl. vendor-managed ones.

clauses.title: BCP incl. vendor systems (Sec.29j)
clauses.text: BCP/testing must cover dependencies on vendor/third-party systems.

clauses.title: IS audit covers third parties
clauses.text: IS audit must cover outsourced/third-party IT services with right to audit the provider.

clauses.title: Vendor Risk Management (CSF C11)
clauses.text: Vendor risk management with security in contracts, ongoing monitoring, and risk assessment of vendors with access.
clauses.source: Cyber Security Framework in Banks 2016, Annex C11

clauses.title: DLP extends to vendor facilities (CSF 15.3)
clauses.text: DLP controls/monitoring must extend to vendor facilities storing/processing bank data.

clauses.title: Secure configuration (CSF C5)
clauses.text: Securely configure systems (incl. vendor-operated) to baselines; remove default credentials.

clauses.title: Patch/vulnerability mgmt (CSF C7)
clauses.text: Timely identification and remediation of vulnerabilities across systems incl. vendor.

clauses.title: Access control & encryption (CSF C8)
clauses.text: Least-privilege access with strong auth; encrypt sensitive bank data at rest and in transit.

clauses.title: Audit logging (CSF C16/17)
clauses.text: Generate, protect and retain logs; capture/monitor security events incl. vendor environments.

clauses.title: Security awareness for vendors (CSF 23.1)
clauses.text: Security awareness/training extends to vendor personnel handling bank systems/data.

clauses.title: App security & source-code audit (CSF 6.2)
clauses.text: Applications (incl. vendor-developed) undergo secure development and source-code/security review before deployment.

clauses.title: Core functions cannot be outsourced
clauses.text: Banks cannot outsource core management/compliance/decision-making; outsourcing must not dilute obligations or RBI oversight.

clauses.title: Outsourcing contract terms (FS)
clauses.text: Agreement defines obligations, confidentiality, security, monitoring, liability, termination, and records availability.

clauses.title: RBI inspection clause (FS)
clauses.text: Contract provides RBI access/inspection of provider documents, records and premises.

clauses.title: Breach notification (FS)
clauses.text: Provider must notify the bank of any security breach or leakage of confidential customer information.

clauses.title: Concentration & systemic risk (FS)
clauses.text: Manage concentration with a single provider and systemic risk where many banks use the same provider.

clauses.title: Grievance; bank liable to customer
clauses.text: Bank remains liable to customers; grievance redressal must not be compromised by outsourcing.

clauses.title: Payment data stored only in India
clauses.text: Entire payment data stored only in India; extends to third-party vendors/intermediaries.
clauses.source: RBI Storage of Payment System Data 2018

clauses.title: Foreign-leg return within 24 hours
clauses.text: Foreign-leg data may be abroad but domestic copy in India; data processed abroad deleted and returned within 24 hours.

clauses.title: CERT-In empanelled SAR
clauses.text: Payment-data compliance confirmed via System Audit Report by a CERT-In empanelled auditor submitted to RBI.

clauses.title: Due diligence on LSP/DLA
clauses.text: Conduct due diligence on LSPs/DLAs before onboarding and periodically (technical, security, conduct).

clauses.title: Data minimisation & India storage (DL)
clauses.text: Collect only need-based data with consent; store all collected data only on servers in India.

clauses.title: No biometric data storage (DL)
clauses.text: DLAs/LSPs must not store borrower biometric data except as permitted by statute/regulation.

clauses.title: Grievance officer at LSP/DLA
clauses.text: RE and LSP must each designate a nodal grievance redressal officer.

clauses.title: CERT-In 6-hour reporting
clauses.text: Service providers/intermediaries/data centres report specified incidents to CERT-In within 6 hours.

clauses.title: CERT-In: 180-day logs in India
clauses.text: Maintain ICT system logs for a rolling 180 days within Indian jurisdiction.

clauses.title: NBFC: vendor background checks & NDAs
clauses.text: Background verification of vendors/staff with access and execution of confidentiality/NDAs.
clauses.source: RBI IT Framework for NBFC Sector 2017

clauses.title: NBFC: vendor incident notification
clauses.text: Vendors notify the NBFC of incidents affecting NBFC systems/data.
clauses.source: RBI IT Framework for NBFC Sector 2017

clauses.title: UCB: vendor controls
clauses.text: UCBs ensure vendor background checks, NDAs, and vendor incident notification per risk tier.
clauses.source: RBI Cyber Security Framework for UCBs 2018/2020
